age.Description: Age of the participant at the time of testing.

education_years.Description: Number of years of formal education completed.

final_sample_stimulus_locked.Description: Inclusion status for the final sample used in the stimulus-locked ERP analyses (N2pc and CDA). N=39 were included.

Levels.included: Participant's data was included in the final N=39 sample for stimulus-locked ERP analysis.
Levels.excluded: Participant's data was excluded due to excessive artifacts or other quality issues.
